title: DRIP KL Present: 19:26
description:
DRIP KL and Horizon proudly welcome 19:26 for an exclusive Kuala Lumpur performance on 17 July 2026.

A defining force in the new wave of melodic electronic music, 19:26 has built a reputation for blending cinematic emotion, neoclassical influences, and forward-thinking electronic sound design. His music exists in the space between memory and the future, where powerful melodies, hypnotic rhythms, and emotional storytelling converge to create unforgettable dancefloor moments.

Following acclaimed releases on Afterlife and Siamese, 19:26 unveiled his most ambitious body of work to date with The Passage EP on Afterlife, a deeply personal exploration of transformation and inner transition. His breakout release XX became a defining milestone, reaching top positions on the Beatport charts and earning support across major international radio stations. His collaboration with Anyma, Giza, further cemented his place among the most exciting artists in melodic electronic music today.

Supported by industry heavyweights including Tale Of Us, Anyma, MRAK, Adriatique, Mathame, Argy, Miss Monique, David Guetta, and Tiësto, 19:26 has captivated audiences worldwide through a sound that balances emotional depth with club-focused precision.

His performances have taken him to some of the world's most iconic stages, including Afterlife Festival, Zamna, Hï Ibiza, Space Miami, Kappa Futur Festival, and the legendary Pyramids of Giza, where his set became a viral phenomenon celebrated for its cinematic intensity and emotional impact.

Supporting him on the night are Victor G, WESUFO, and Boriz, who will set the tone with a carefully curated selection of melodic house, progressive sounds, and peak-time energy, creating the perfect build-up to the headline performance.

For this special showcase, we're bringing the Sunset by Neon energy indoors. Transforming DRIP KL into an immersive journey of music, visuals, and atmosphere inspired by the festival's signature sound and energy.

Now, for one night only, experience 19:26's immersive sound in the intimate setting of DRIP KL.


For VIP table reservations contact +6018 788 0858.

title: NEW COMPOSITION 004: CLUB MASCOT & JAY V.
Special Event for MARCH CHUTAVUTH 1st Exclusive Fan Meeting “The First Memory in Tokyo”
description:
✨スペシャルイベントチケット販売決定！✨


「MARCH CHUTAVUTH 1st Exclusive Fan Meeting “The First Summer Memory in Tokyo”」ご参加者限定！


💖 スペシャルイベントでは、マーチとの1分間ファンサイン会をお楽しみいただけます！

🎫 各公演20枚限定！

📅 開催日：2026年8月2日（日）


スペシャルイベントチケットは、2026年7月5日（日）12:00（日本時間）より、下記サイトにて販売開始いたします！

🔴 https://www.ticketmelon.com/g-yucreative/MarchFansigninTokyo


注意事項・参加条件

1. 本イベントにご参加いただくには、「MARCH CHUTAVUTH 1st Exclusive Fan Meeting “The First Summer Memory in Tokyo”」のチケット（全席種対象）が必要です。

2. イベント当日の受付にて、スペシャルイベントチケットおよびファンミーティングチケットの両方をご提示ください。

3. ファンミーティングチケット1枚につき、スペシャルイベントチケットは1枚までご購入いただけます。

4. 1分間ファンサイン会は、ファンミーティング終演後、すべての特典会終了後に実施いたします。

5. ご参加のお客様は、March Chutavuth本人との1分間のファンサインおよび交流をお楽しみいただけます。

6. サインは、スペシャルイベントチケット1枚につき1点までとさせていただきます。

7. ご購入後のチケットは、いかなる理由があってもキャンセル・払い戻しはできません。

8. 本イベントに関する最終的な判断は主催者が行います。なお、主催者は予告なく本注意事項・参加条件を変更する場合がございますので、あらかじめご了承ください。


✨ SPECIAL EVENT TICKETS ANNOUNCEMENT! ✨


Exclusively for ticket holders of the "MARCH CHUTAVUTH 1st Exclusive Fan Meeting 'The First Summer Memory in Tokyo'" Only!!


💖 Join this exclusive special event and enjoy a 1-minute fan sign session with March!

🎫 Limited to 20 tickets per show

📅 Event Date: Sunday, August 2, 2026


Special Event tickets will go on sale from 12:00 PM (JST) on Sunday, July 5, 2026, via link below.

🔴 https://www.ticketmelon.com/g-yucreative/MarchFansigninTokyo


Rules & Conditions

1. Participants must hold a valid ticket for the "MARCH CHUTAVUTH 1st Exclusive Fan Meeting 'The First Summer Memory in Tokyo'" (any seating zone).

2. Staff will verify both your Special Event ticket and Fan Meeting ticket at the registration point on the event day.

3. Each March Fan Meeting ticket holder may purchase one Special Event ticket only.

4. The 1-minute Fan Sign session will begin after all general fan benefits have concluded.

5. Each participant will have 1 minute with March Chutavuth for a fan sign and a brief interaction.

6. Only one item may be signed per Special Event ticket.

7. All ticket purchases are non-refundable under any circumstances.

8. The company's decision is final. The company reserves the right to amend these terms and conditions without prior notice.


#MARCH1stFMinTokyo #marchutavuth #ThaiActor #TokyoEvent #gyucreative

title: Sanctuary Afterparty ft. David Forbes
description:
The party continues with the official Sanctuary Afterparty featuring none other than David Forbes 🔥

Tickets are live now. Don’t wait on this one.


TICKETING TERMS & CONDITIONS:

  • Please refer to the minimum age requirement for the event, no refunds will be provided for underage attendees. 
  • The right of admission is reserved by the event management and venue management parties
  • The right is reserved to vary, substitute or withdraw advertised programs, artists, venue and seating arrangements as necessary
  • This ticket is only valid only when purchased through an authorised agent
  • Patrons who disrupt a performance, who are in use or possession of a prohibited object or fail to produce valid identification may be asked to leave the venue without refund of ticket purchase
  • All tickets sold are final - no refunds will be provided for change in mind or inability to attend due to personal reasons or duplicate orders by the customer. Refunds may be provided through the refund ticket protection add on through the check out process. 
  • Please be aware that we have no obligation to honour tickets purchased via unauthorised re-sellers. If you attend one of our events with a ticket purchased via an unauthorised re-seller such or otherwise , you may be refused entry to the event. 
  • The ticket holder bears the risk of dangers incidental to the event, whether occurring prior to, during or after the event including (but not exclusively) - the dangers of being struck by projected objects, atmospheric effects, strobe light usage or loud noises. If impacted - immediately contact event staff for assistance. 
  • Policies and procedures adopted are subject to change at any time without notice

title: Lomosonic and Bedroom Audio Live at Bangkok Soundscape
description:

title: Catch Your Next Wave at Phuket Surf House
description:
Patong's Pulse Meets the Ocean's Power

Surrounded by all the action yet connected to the calm of the ocean—Phuket Surf House gives you the best of both worlds. Located prime on Beach Road, 200 meters from Bangla's legendary nightlife and just steps from the sand, we're where the energy of Patong meets the thrill of world-class surfing. This isn't just location. It's destination.

Join us for epic waves, delicious food and drinks, and unforgettable memories.

title: SONIC! Sunrise Beach Sessions
venueName: Saranai Beach House - Art Coffee & Recycle Bar
description:
One night on a secluded beach, minutes from Hoi An. Together with Dreamscape Tents we're setting a bedouin tent right by the sea, mixing sea and sound waves from sunset to sunrise, all of it carried on our own L Acoustics system.

George Haruld, fresh from Bristol with a decade in the UK underground, Motion, Warehouse Project, support from Mixmag, and a catalogue running from garage to jungle.

Devin brings thirty years behind the decks and a residency at Tunnel, Seoul, blending house, funk and electro into hypnotic territory. He closes the night with a sunrise set over the water.

Red, from Hanoi, digs wide, jazz fusion and disco on vinyl, breaks and heavy bass on digital.

Jazz Cat Luong, of the local Bamboogie crew, opens the night on vinyl, funky grooves while the light goes down.

Alongside them, our residents Just Ngoc and Patrick S, the sound this coast already knows.

Sat 1 August, 6pm till 6am. Saranai, Hoi An.
Advance 150k, door 250k.

Open air, on sand, all night.

title: lullaboy: Hotels & Heartbreaks Tour - Live in Bangkok
description:
lullaboy – Hotels & Heartbreaks Tour
📍 Artspace Bantadthong, Bangkok 🇹🇭
📅 28 July 2026
🕗 8:00 PM

lullaboy brings his HOTELS & HEARTBREAKS TOUR to Bangkok for one unforgettable night.

With over 200 million streams and a global fanbase of like-minded souls, lullaboy has built a world where vulnerability becomes a personal soundtrack - for sunny days, lonely nights, and everything in between.

Known for his raw honesty and emotionally driven songwriting, he blends indie pop, R&B, emo-rock, folk, and gospel into deeply personal stories that feel intimate, relatable, and quietly powerful. His songs don’t just play once - they stay with you.

This tour marks a new chapter.

For the first time, lullaboy brings fans into the world of hotels & heartbreaks - a live experience that moves through love, loss, and healing. From stripped-back moments that feel like a late-night heart to heart, to full band highs that bring every emotion to life, the show takes you on a journey through the “12 floors” of heartbreak… and what comes after.

Expect fan-favorite classics and new music from his latest album, performed the way they were meant to be felt: live.

From studying under YG Entertainment to graduating from Berklee College of Music and songwriting at SM Entertainment, lullaboy’s rise has been anything but ordinary. As one of the first Spotify Asia RADAR artists, he has taken storytelling to major festival stages worldwide and his previous six-country tour.

Now, after gaining global recognition, he returns to Bangkok on his nine-country tour. 

✨ Don’t miss lullaboy live - an evening of music, emotion, and core memories that stay with you long after the night ends.

title: Lost & Flower
description:
คุณมองเห็นดอกไม้ครั้งสุดท้าย..เมื่อไร?


Lost & F1ower

นิทรรศการที่จะพาคุณกลับมาพบดอกไม้ที่หายไปจากใจคุณ 


ในวันที่โลกทำให้คุณรู้สึกว่าใครๆ ต่างมีชีวิตที่ดี…กว่าคุณ จนหลายครั้ง ก็เผลอตั้งคำถามกับตัวเองว่า “ฉันดีพอหรือยัง”, “คุณค่าของฉันอยู่ที่ไหน?”, “ฉันคือใครบนโลกใบนี้?” 


ครั้งแรกของนิทรรศการเปิดบ้าน The Present Haus ที่จะพาคุณไปพบกับดอกไม้ดอกหนึ่ง ดอกไม้ที่ทำให้คุณได้กลับไปมองเห็นสิ่งสำคัญที่อยู่ภายใน ให้หัวใจคุณได้เบ่งบานขึ้นอีกครั้ง 


รายละเอียด:

🌸  นิทรรศการนี้เหมาะสำหรับผู้ที่ต้องการใช้เวลากับตัวเอง ทบทวนความรู้สึก และเปิดพื้นที่ให้ใจได้พัก

🌸  นิทรรศการเปิดให้เข้าชมได้ตั้งแต่วันที่ 20 มีนาคม 2569 เป็นต้นไป

🌸  กิจกรรมและประสบการณ์ภายในนิทรรศการจัดเป็นภาษาไทย

🌸  เปิดทำการวันอังคาร–อาทิตย์ (ปิดวันจันทร์) เวลา 10:00–18:00 น.

🌸  ประสบการณ์จัดเป็นรอบ จำกัดผู้เข้าชมรอบละ 8 ท่าน เพื่อให้ทุกคนได้มีพื้นที่ของตนเองอย่างแท้จริง

🌸  บัตรเข้าชมราคา 150 บาทต่อท่าน รายได้หลังหักค่าใช้จ่ายสนับสนุนกิจกรรมของมูลนิธิไทยคม

🌸  บัตรเข้าชมสามารถนำไปแลกรับเครื่องดื่มที่ The Present Haus Cafe ได้ 1 แก้ว ตามเงื่อนไขที่กำหนด ภายในวันเดียวกัน

🌸  รับสิทธิ์จอดรถ 2 ชั่วโมง เมื่อแสดงบัตรเข้าชมนิทรรศการ ทั้งนี้ พื้นที่จอดรถมีจำนวนจำกัด กรุณาเผื่อเวลาในการเดินทาง 

 


ร่วมสัมผัสการ “ตื่นรู้อยู่กับปัจจุบัน” ด้วย “CORE Model” แนวทางฝึกใจของ เดอะเพรเซนต์ เฮ้าส์ ผ่านนิทรรศการ “Lost and Flower” สร้างสรรค์โดย ชูใจ กะ กัลยาณมิตร และ เดอะเพรเซนต์ เฮ้าส์ โดย มูลนิธิไทยคม

Experience “Mindfulness” through The Present Haus’s “CORE Model” in the exhibition “Lost and Flower,” created by Choojai & Friends and The Present Haus by Thaicom Foundation

title: THE CALL OF PACHAMAMA: ECSTATIC DANCE & CACAO RITUAL
description:
THE CALL OF PACHAMAMA🌿

Ecstatic tribal gathering🔥


Ecstatic Dance & Cacao Ritual.

Come Back to Your Roots. Awaken Your Primal State. Move Your Soul. Find Your Tribe.

-------------------------------------


Dear tribe! We are ready to welcome you for our next ecstatic tribal gathering!

THE CALL OF PACHAMAMA, July 18th!

Another month passed which means we are ready to welcome our tribe again🔥

Life changes fast, but some things stay permanent, such as our events. Together we will dive into cacao ceremony, movement, lots of dance & music, fire & drums performance, sound healing & soft grounding. 

We promise you an unforgettable journey, community of like-minded people, place to be your most honest version. But you know that already, don’t you ?😜

🌿no alcohol, substances or phones

🌿Boundaries & consent 

Through ecstatic dance, cacao ritual, embodied exploration, music and dance, we show our gratitude and respect towards Mother Earth🌿

About ecstatic dance:

Ecstatic dance is free-form movement that combines dance, music, and mindfulness into a liberating, expressive experience. It is a practice where we relax into the truth of our hearts and bodies, and allow ecstasy to naturally arise within.

This is a space of radical freedom: movement without judgment, connection without words.

-------------------------------------

THE JOURNEY OF CONNECTION

  • 4:30 doors open. Welcome to the space
  • 5:00 cacao ceremony by Natasha & Steven
  • 5:30 ecstatic opening & movement initiation by Natasha
  • 6:00 ecstatic journey by dj Mjay
  • 8:15 sound healing & grounding  
  • 8:45 singing circle by Steven
  • 9:15 closing &sharing
  • 9:40 transfer to Danang (if transportation tickets were purchased)

-------------------------------------

THE KEEPERS OF THE MAGIC

🌿 Host, “Move through it” practice : Natasha

🎧 DJ Mjay

☕️ Cacao ceremony by “The Erosa”, Natasha & Steven

🎵 Steven, Dana, Lua, Nirmal

🧚 Our fairies & space holders: Natasha, Iuliana, Mafer, Saebyuk

🔥 Fire show : Dana & Lua

🍵 Tea zone : Uiliana & Roman

-------------------------------------

ABOUT YOUR GUIDES

Natasha (The Alchemist)

A plant medicine guide and Dance Movement Therapy facilitator, Natasha holds space with deep care. Her "Move Through It" method creates a safe, loving container for you to explore your inner world through movement. Her guidance will help you to relax and feel comfortable to move. 

M Jay (The Sonic Saxophone)

The founder of Extaticaa, M Jay doesn't just play music. He channels grooves that awaken the spirit. With experience curating dance floors across Europe and the U.S., he brings a ritual-first approach to every set.

Steven (The Wise Musician)

An experienced yogi and kirtan facilitator, Steven holds space for music to flow and hearts to open. This night he will guide our voices into heart-opening song.

Dana (The Fire Magician)

A musician and fire performer, Dana brings a force of energy that is both grounding and electrifying. He will show us the raw magic of fire.

Lua (The Fire Witch)

A musician and fire performer, Lua brings a force of feminine fire  energy that is both grounding and electrifying. She will show us the raw magic of fire, dance and love

--------------------------------

Our ceremonial cacao by Erosa Chocolate @the.erosa

Rich, organic cacao from Erosa sets the mood for the night. Its deep, natural taste opens the heart. (Vegan, no added sugar)

--------------------------------

PRICES, LOCATION AND TRANSPORTATION 

🎟️ Early birds (available until afternoon July 17) 333k

Online purchase EXTATICAA.com/en/events

Offline in Danang (WhatsApp +79186502014)

🎟️ At the gate 400k

🎟️ +🚌 450k

  • To get the transportation ticket, please book it 2 days before the event so we can organise the number. Round trip. Leave Danang at 3:40, leave Hoian at 9:40pm

📍 Salt, Hoian

--------------------------------

THE TRIBE RULES

To preserve the high vibration of our space, we honor these boundaries:

  • Pure Presence: A sober, drug and alcohol-free environment.
  • Digital Detox: No phones on the dance floor. Connect with the moment, not the screen.
  • Sacred Silence: This is a non-verbal journey. Let your body speak.
  • Consensual Space: Respect personal boundaries. Move with love and mindfulness.
  • Radical Acceptance: Suspend all judgment of yourself and others.

--------------------------------

title: All Night Long - Mumsfilijayja
description:
S.R-C Presents MUMSFILIJAYJA @mumsfilibaba.music @jayjaja ALL NIGHT LONG ⚡️


For the first time, MUMSFILIBABA and JAYJA come together for a special all-night session at DISCOTHEQUE. A new collaborative project where instinctive selections meet joyful dancefloor energy, moving effortlessly through House, Soul, Funk, Disco, Breaks and beyond. 🔊


With over a decade of connecting dancefloors across Europe and Asia, MUMSFILIBABA is known for genre-fluid journeys guided by feeling rather than genre. Alongside, Bangkok selector JAYJA brings soulful grooves, deep cuts and an instinctive flow that keeps the dancefloor moving from start to finish.🔥

title: Oceanfromtheblue — Way To Blue in Bangkok
description:
Oceanfromtheblue — Way To Blue in Bangkok 

05.09.2026 | Volume Livehouse

 

เสียงที่คุณฟังในค่ำคืนอันเงียบสงบ ตอนขับรถยามดึก หรือตอนเดินกลับบ้าน ในที่สุดก็จะได้ฟังใกล้ ๆ แล้ว 🎧💙

นักร้อง-นักแต่งเพลงชาวโซล oceanfromtheblue จะมาพบกับทุกคนในโชว์ Way to Blue ที่ Volume Live House, Ratchada ในวันที่ 5 กันยายน 2026 นี้

ตั้งแต่ความขื่นขมใน mistaken ไปจนถึงความเศร้าใน sherlock เพลงของเขาสามารถถ่ายทอดหลากหลายความรู้สึกที่แฟนเพลงทั่วโลกต่างหลงรัก

Fishes! การรอคอยสิ้นสุดลงแล้ว และ oceanfromtheblue ก็ตื่นเต้นไม่แพ้กัน 🐟

มาร่วมค่ำคืนแห่งความทรงจำด้วยกันนะคะ 💙

 

งาน: oceanfromtheblue - Way To Blue in Bangkok 

วันที่ : 5 กันยายน 2569 

สถานที่: Volume Livehouse, The Street Ratchada

รูปแบบการชม: บัตรยืน (Standing) 

เปิดจำหน่ายบัตร: 18 กรกฎาคม 2569 (10:00 น.) เป็นต้นไป 

หมายเหตุสำคัญ (IMPORTANT NOTICE) :

•⁠  ⁠ทุกคนที่เข้าร่วมงานต้องมีบัตรคนละใบ รวมถึงผู้ที่มากับเด็กหรือผู้พิการ

•⁠  ⁠บัตร Add-on ไม่ใช่บัตรเข้าชมงาน เป็นแพ็คเกจสิทธิพิเศษเพิ่มเติม ต้องมีบัตรคอนเสิร์ตเพื่อรับสิทธิ์

•⁠  ⁠รายละเอียดงานอาจมีการเปลี่ยนแปลงตามข้อกำหนด

•⁠  ⁠เวลาจัดงานอาจมีการปรับเปลี่ยนตามประกาศของผู้จัด


Oceanfromtheblue — Way To Blue in Bangkok 

05.09.2026 | Volume Livehouse

 



The voice that’s been with you through late nights, quite drive and long walks home is finally coming to Bangkok. 🎧💙

Korean R&B singer-songwriter oceanfromtheblue is bringing his Way to Blue show to Bangkok on September 5, 2026 at Volume Livehouse, The Street Ratchada.  

From ‘mistaken’ to ‘sherlock’, his songs capture the bittersweet feelings and blue emotions that fans around the world love. 

Fishes, the wait is almost over & he’s just as excited as you are. 🐟

Join us for an intimate night you won’t forget.

 

Events: oceanfromtheblue - Way To Blue in Bangkok 

Date: September 5, 2026

Venue: Volume Livehouse, The Street Ratchada

Format: Standing  

Tickets on Sale: 18 July 2026 at 10:00 AM (ICT) via TicketMelon

 

IMPORTANT NOTICE 

•    Everyone entering the venue mush have their own ticket including companions of minors or persons with disabilities. 

•    Add-on tickets are NOT entry tickets. They are addition benefit packages and required a valid concert ticket to redeem.

•    Event details are subject to change based on regulations. 

•    Event timing is estimated and may be updated by the organizer.

title: HINGA: A Midweek Choral Break (July 2026)
description:
HINGA: A Midweek Choral Break

An hour between work and home doesn't have to be spent in traffic.

HINGA is a new bi-weekly choral listening series by SANGHIMIG Performing Arts Events, created for those who want to pause, slow down, and recharge in the middle of the week. Each evening will feature a different choir presenting a one-hour program.

Whether you're a longtime choral enthusiast or simply looking for a meaningful way to spend your Wednesday evening, HINGA offers a refreshing alternative to the usual after-work routine.

Join us as we launch the series this July with two evenings of live choral music:

Wednesday, July 15 • 7:00 PM - 8:00 PM: The Philippine Meistersingers (Ramon Lijauco, Jr., conductor)
Wednesday, July 29 • 7:00 PM - 8:00 PM: Coro Regina Coeli - Philippines (Renalie Dela Cruz Aquino, choirmaster)

Doors open at 6:30 PM at the Ground Floor, YSpace at the Yuchengco Museum, RCBC Plaza, Makati City.

Additional HINGA performances will continue on select Wednesday evenings through November 2026.

Come after work. Take a seat. Put your phone away.

Stay for an hour. Let the traffic pass. Let the music stay.

Pause. Listen. Breathe.

title: Paradox and Slur at Bangkok Soundscape

title: 2026 ifeye 1st APAC TOUR [ If I ] in MANILA - ADD-ONS
description:
Exclusive Add-on Packages for  Manila Stop!

To bring you even closer to ifeye, we are thrilled to offer exclusive Add-on Packages for the Manila stop of the  APAC Tour! These limited-edition experiences are designed to create unforgettable, intimate memories with Kasia, Rahee, Won Hwayeon, Meu, Taerin, and Sasha.

Add-on Packages include:

  • 1v1 Snapshot: Capture a beautiful, high-quality moment with your favorite member.
  • 1v1 Polaroid: Take home a unique, instant keepsake straight from the event.
  • 1v1 Fansign: Enjoy a special, face-to-face interaction and share your heartfelt support directly with the members.

Add-on information：

Event Time | July 27, 2026 (Mon), prior to the concert (Actual schedule is subject to on-site announcements)

Venue | Music Museum

How to Purchase | A valid ticket for the 2026 ifeye APAC TOUR  in Manila is required to purchase Add-on packages.

Eligibility | To participate in the Add-on events, attendees must present both a valid concert ticket and an Add-on voucher.

title: MOKSHA II
description: Every MOKSHA edition celebrates an element deeply rooted in South Asian culture. This edition is inspired by sandalwood, a symbol of calm, devotion, and timeless craftsmanship. Known as chandan across much of India, its warm aroma has accompanied ceremonies, meditation, and moments of celebration for centuries. Through scent, texture, and sound, this edition invites guests into an experience where tradition and contemporary music meet, creating an atmosphere that lingers long after the final track.
